MINI MINUTES: APPEARAMCES:
Laura Flynn, (415)318-5709 for Plaintiff/Opposing party Baatar Yadambat.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court rules as follows: DEFENDANT RONG LI Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deposition Responses On Identity Of Witnesses is off calendar per request of the moving party. The case has settled. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deposition Responses On Identity Of Witnesses

MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Laura Flynn, Hooshman Law Group, appearing for Plaintiffs Baatar Yadambat et al, Telephone 415-318-5709;
Nolan Armstrong, McNamara, Ney, Beatty, Slattery, Borges & Ambacher, LLP, appearing for Defendant Rong Li, Telephone 925-939-5330;

Counsel for plaintiff does not stipulate to a Judge Pro Tem.

DEFENDANT RONG LI'S Motion To Compel Deposition Responses On Identity Of Witnesses is continued to August 6, 2018 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 501. Judge Pro Tem to prepare a report and recommendation for the court.
